errorPatterns.condition: Staircase fills all available height to maxBottom, then quoteBanner overlaps because no room left
errorPatterns.fix: Added h parameter to staircase (bring-core.js line 2836) to limit height. Also added h parameter to quoteBanner (line 703). When staircase is followed by quoteBanner, set staircase h:2.3 and remove quoteBanner author to reduce height from 1.4 to 0.8
